storms.name: May 2024 Extreme Geomagnetic Storm
storms.significance: First G5 storm since November 2003. Strongest storm in 21 years. Aurora visible in Ladakh, India.
storms.why_primary: Most recent major storm and a genuine model validation case after the training window.
storms.data_source: Synthetic fallback profile matching NOAA/SWPC storm morphology until archived data is downloaded.
storms.demo_script: NAKSHATRA-KAVACH predicts G4-G5 conditions before peak; satellites and grid corridors move into critical risk.

key_moments.event: G3 conditions - satellites at HIGH risk

storms.name: Quebec Blackout Geomagnetic Storm
storms.significance: Hydro-Quebec's 735kV system collapsed in 92 seconds; 6 million people lost power for 9 hours.
storms.why_included: Best demonstration of grid GIC risk and the canonical space-weather power failure.
storms.data_source: Synthetic fallback profile matching reconstructed OMNI hourly storm morphology.
storms.demo_script: NAKSHATRA-KAVACH flags long north-south lines at critical GIC risk before collapse.

key_moments.event: Kp=9 G5 PEAK - Quebec grid collapses

storms.name: Halloween Geomagnetic Storms 2003
storms.significance: Multiple X-class flares, 40+ satellite anomalies, Sweden power outage, and ISS crew radiation sheltering.
storms.why_included: Shows sustained multi-peak satellite risk over a week-long storm sequence.
storms.data_source: Synthetic fallback profile matching reconstructed OMNI hourly multi-event morphology.

key_moments.event: First CME arrives - G4 storm begins
X10 flare - second CME launched Oct 29
X28+ flare Nov 4 - strongest ever recorded
Final G5 peak - storm gradually ends

storms.name: Starlink Satellite Loss Geomagnetic Storm
storms.significance: A moderate G1 storm destroyed 38-40 Starlink satellites during low-altitude deployment.
storms.why_included: Demonstrates that low Kp can still be catastrophic for vulnerable LEO satellites.
storms.data_source: Synthetic fallback profile matching NOAA/SWPC storm morphology until archived data is downloaded.
storms.demo_script: Cartosat-3 shows elevated drag risk; operators are advised to suspend LEO maneuvers.

key_moments.event: Starlink orbit-raising fails - drag too high
